input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON; those formats require optional hoplite-yaml, hoplite-json, hoplite-toml, or hoplite-hocon modules and should not be assumed available when testing hoplite-core alone.
Hoplite 3 applies environment variables as a default property source, so tests should prefer explicit builder setup or map/props sources when they need deterministic input.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is required: hoplite-core resolves its required Kotlin reflection/coroutines dependencies transitively, and meaningful core coverage is reachable with built-in MapPropertySource, Props/.properties parsing, decoders, preprocessors, and classpath/resource APIs.
